title: Acceptance of donations by state and parish school boards
doc_html:
PART V. DONATIONS FOR EDUCATIONAL OR LITERARY PURPOSES

§381. Acceptance of donations by state and parish school boards

            The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education and any school board, in accordance with the provisions of this Part, may accept and administer any donation that may be made to them for educational or literary purposes, and each board shall enumerate details of the contents of such donations in a document made publicly available on its website.

            Acts 2023, No. 346, §1.
doc_text:
PART V.  DONATIONS FOR EDUCATIONAL OR LITERARY PURPOSES
§381.  Acceptance of donations by state and parish school boards
The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education and any school board, in
accordance with the provisions of this Part, may accept and administer any donation that may
be made to them for educational or literary purposes, and each board shall enumerate details
of the contents of such donations in a document made publicly available on its website.
Acts 2023, No. 346, §1.
